metadata.description: A grab bag of useful Claude Code plugins. Each plugin does one job and gets out of the way.

plugins.name: youtube-transcript
plugins.description: Download YouTube video transcripts via yt-dlp. Saves both the original .vtt and a cleaned .txt (timestamps, cue ids, and inline tags stripped; rolling auto-sub duplicates collapsed).

plugins.name: remotion-video
plugins.description: Prompt-driven motion-graphics video creation with Remotion. Plans the video beat-by-beat, builds scenes with screenshot verification, iterates in Studio preview, renders to MP4. Maintains a persistent brand style guide across videos.

plugins.name: screencast-cut
plugins.description: Edit a terminal recording (.cast) or screen capture (.mp4) into a finished tutorial video. Detects idle gaps and speed-ramps or cuts them, transcribes audio with Whisper for word-level captions, and emits a Remotion project that the remotion-video plugin can render. Reuses the active brand profile so output matches the rest of your videos.

plugins.name: music-grab
plugins.description: Grab just the audio from a YouTube / SoundCloud / direct URL via yt-dlp, save it under your project's music folder, and append a CREDITS.md entry recording the source URL, license evidence found in the source page description, and any attribution requirements. Warn-and-proceed on missing license language — the user owns final license verification.
